allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('d:/opr-mis1/backend/mis_data.json'\)\); pages=[p for p in data if isinstance\(p.get\('page'\), int\) and 11 <= p['page'] <= 20]; [print\(f\\"Page {p['page']}: type={p.get\('type','?'\)} title={p.get\('title','?'\)[:60]}\\"\) for p in pages]")
